event_notes: Source venue label preserved during 2026-03-18 Wave 2 venue canonicalization: Goat, Teanaway Forks.
event_comments:
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Course: Beginner – 2.6k, 8 controls, 70m climb (no skips).
Course: Zygoat (intermediate) – 5.1k, 11 controls, 170m climb (1 skipped control).
Course: Kid (advanced) – 7.2k, 14 controls, 195m climb (2 non-consecutive skipped controls).
Course: Ibex (advanced) – 11.6k, 18 controls, 370m climb (2 non-consecutive skipped controls).
Course: Goat (advanced) – 16.3k, 25 controls, 580m climb (2 non-consecutive skipped controls).
Result status codes: MSP = missing punch; DNF = did not finish; NC = not competing; DQ = disqualified; OVT = overtime; DNS = did not start.
Source note: a starred time indicates course completion status was not reported and may be valid, MSP, or DNF.
